title: Red Hat Security Advisory: gnupg2 security update
overview:
An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: gnupg2 security update

An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
gnupg2-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.src.rpm
gnupg2-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.4.5-2.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2026-24882: A flaw was found in GnuPG. This vulnerability, a stack-based buffer overflow, occurs in the `tpm2daemon` component when processing PKDECRYPT commands for cryptographic keys secured by a Trusted Platform Module (TPM). A local attacker could exploit this to execute unauthorized code, potentially gaining full control of the system, or disrupt its operation, leading to a denial of service.
